bug_locations.reason: Union body parameters are likely being misclassified as non-body/scalar fields. The fallback conversion to Body(...) depends on is_scalar_field(), which does not appear to correctly handle Union model annotations.

The scalar field detection logic relies on lenient_issubclass(field.type_, BaseModel), which can fail for typing.Union annotations like Union[Item, OtherItem]. This directly affects request body schema generation.
The routing between query/body parameter handling depends on is_scalar_field(). Union model types may incorrectly enter the scalar/query branch instead of being treated as body parameters.
